name: SoFi Technologies, Inc.
summary: SoFi Technologies, Inc. is a financial services company offering a range of products including lending, banking, investing, and financial planning services. Through subsidiaries such as SoFi Bank (National Association), SoFi Securities LLC, SoFi Wealth LLC, and SoFi Capital Advisors, the company provides personal loans, home loans, student loan refinancing, brokerage accounts, robo-advisory services, and deposit accounts. The company also operates Technisys, a cloud-based banking platform.
